title: Testing & Calibration Lab
tagline: High-frequency measurement and calibration infrastructure for electronic prototypes.

equipment.name: Tektronix DSA 8300 Digital Serial Analyzer Sampling Oscilloscope
equipment.purpose: High-speed serial data signal integrity measurement up to 70 GHz

equipment.name: Vector Network Analyzer (VNA)
equipment.purpose: S-parameter measurement for RF and microwave circuits

equipment.name: Spectrum Analyzer
equipment.purpose: Frequency-domain analysis and EMI pre-compliance testing

equipment.name: Arbitrary Waveform Generator (AWG)
equipment.purpose: Stimulus signal generation for device testing

equipment.name: DC Power Supply (Bench, multi-channel)
equipment.purpose: Regulated power for prototypes under test

equipment.name: LCR Meter
equipment.purpose: Precision impedance, inductance, and capacitance measurement

equipment.name: Logic Analyzer
equipment.purpose: Multi-channel digital signal capture and protocol decode

equipment.name: Protocol Analyzer (USB / I2C / SPI / CAN)
equipment.purpose: Embedded communication bus analysis and debugging

equipment.name: Function / Signal Generator
equipment.purpose: Standard waveform generation for circuit testing

equipment.name: Thermal Camera
equipment.purpose: Infrared thermal profiling of PCBs and power devices

equipment.name: Environmental Test Chamber
equipment.purpose: Temperature and humidity stress testing of prototypes
